channel.title: Thorpe Family History
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Thorpe Family History

item.title: Shared Intake 2026-04-24 Census InDesign Summaries
item.description: Shared Intake 2026-04-24: Census InDesign Summaries Overview This intake batch contains 88 individual Census InDesign summary PDFs extracted from the shared intake folder.

item.title: Shared Intake 2026-04-24 Census InDesign Summaries
item.description: Shared Intake 2026-04-24: Census InDesign Summaries Overview This intake batch contains 88 individual Census InDesign summary PDFs extracted from the shared intake folder.

item.title: Ann Sorrell
item.description: Ann Sorrell Biographical Profile Name: Ann Sorrell Role in this project: Sorrell-line maternal ancestor reconstructed from census extracts and cross-reference mapping.

item.title: Ann Unknown
item.description: Ann Unknown Biographical Profile Name: Ann Unknown Role in this project: Transitional alias profile retained for traceability from source index naming.

item.title: Benjamin B Tallman
item.description: Benjamin B Tallman Biographical Profile Name: Benjamin B Tallman Role in this project: Tallman-line individual indexed in the census summary extraction.

item.description: Dinah Boone Biographical Profile Name: Dinah Boone Role in this project: Tallman-line spouse represented in the Burial Sites book.
